headline: PGIM Jennison Natural Resources Fund Q1 2026 Contributors And Detractors
summary: PGIM Jennison Natural Resources Fund generated a solid return but underperformed 22.2% return of its Lipper Global Natural Resources Index benchmark for the quarter. Read more here.
